raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the core conceptual issues (end-to-end vs. pipeline, supervision-free vs. supervised) and proposes a reframing that aligns with prior work, showing where the draft drifts from its main claims.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency (training regime, supervision, attribution of gains) and proposing minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, such as the need to verify citation keys and SpanSeqGen's reported F1_ans.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are introduced; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original draft (self-contradictions, unsupported claims) and addresses them.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core conceptual issues (end-to-end vs. pipeline, supervision-free vs. supervised) and proposes a reframing that aligns with prior work, showing where the draft drifts from its main claims.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency (training regime, supervision, attribution of gains) and proposing minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, such as the need to verify citation keys and SpanSeqGen's reported F1_ans.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original draft (self-contradictions, unsupported claims) and addresses them.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability.
